name: Camarones Ajillo- Shrimp Garlic
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs medium sized shrimp, peeled, deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet until hot.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes until light golden brown.
3. Add shrimp, tobasco sauce, and salt.
4. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle parsley and squeeze lemon juice.
6. Stir and serve in 6 small appetizer dishes.
